rawIntent: Add a GET /metrics endpoint in src/app.ts that uses the prom-client library to expose default Node.js process metrics in Prometheus text format. Ensure that 'prom-client' is installed as a dependency and add a default export to the module.

successCriteria.description: A GET /metrics endpoint is available that returns Node.js process metrics in Prometheus text format.
'prom-client' is listed as a dependency in package.json.
The module exports the metrics endpoint as a default export.

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Any other endpoints or features not mentioned in the intent
